---
title: "Research"
description: "My research focuses on climate change and climate variability in the Pyrenees, extreme precipitation events, synoptic climatology, and teleconnection patterns across the Iberian Peninsula and Mediterranean region."
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
format: html
toc: true
toc-location: left
---

<style>
ol li { margin-bottom: 0.6rem; }
</style>

```{r setup}
source("_common.R")
```

<center>

[View my full CV here](cv.qmd)

`r htmltools::HTML(paste0(icon_link(icon = "ai ai-google-scholar", text = "Google Scholar", url = "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=iOCaO7sAAAAJ"), icon_link(icon = "ai ai-orcid", text = "ORCID", url = "https://orcid.org/0000-0002-0925-3827"), icon_link(icon = "ai ai-researchgate", text = "Research Gate", url = "https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Marc-Lemus-Canovas")))`

</center>

<br>

## Peer-Reviewed Journal Articles

1. Bonsoms, Josep, González-Herrero, Sergi, Fettweis, Xavier, **Lemus-Cánovas, Marc**, Oliva, Marc, & López-Moreno, Juan I. (2026) "Record-breaking Greenland ice sheet melt events under recent and future climate" Nature Communications, 17, 3605. DOI: [10.1038/s41467-026-69543-5](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41467-026-69543-5)

2. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Crespi, Alice, Maines, Elena, Terzi, Stefano, & Pittore, Massimiliano. (2025) "More intense heatwaves under drier conditions: a compound event analysis in the Adige River basin (Eastern Italian Alps)" Hydrology and Earth System Sciences, 29, 6781–6809. DOI: [10.5194/hess-29-6781-2025](https://doi.org/10.5194/hess-29-6781-2025)

3. Albalat, A., Trapero, L., **Lemus-Canovas, M.**, & Pons, M. (2025) "Characterizing past and current snow seasons through the application of a new multivariate snow index" Journal of Hydrology, 657, 133050. DOI: [10.1016/j.jhydrol.2025.133050](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhydrol.2025.133050)

4. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Gonzalez-Herrero, Sergi, Trapero, Laura, Albalat, Anna, Insua-Costa, Damian, Senande-Rivera, Martin, & Miguez-Macho, Gonzalo. (2025) "Exploring the interplay between observed warming, atmospheric circulation, and soil–atmosphere feedbacks on heatwaves in a temperate mountain region" Natural Hazards and Earth System Sciences, 25, 2503–2518. DOI: [10.5194/nhess-25-2503-2025](https://doi.org/10.5194/nhess-25-2503-2025)

5. Martín-Vide, Javier, Gonzalez-Hidalgo, José Carlos, Moreno-García, M. Carmen, Beguería, Santiago, Cordobilla, M. J., Balagué, Xavier, Cuscó, Eduard, Peña-Angulo, Dhais, **Lemus, Marc**, & Trullenque, Víctor. (2025) "Spatial patterns of statistical relationship between the North Atlantic Oscillation and the Western Mediterranean Oscillation, and precipitation in Peninsular Spain" Atmósfera, 39. DOI: [10.20937/atm.53490](https://doi.org/10.20937/atm.53490)

6. Bonsoms, Josep, López-Moreno, Juan I., **Lemus-Cánovas, Marc**, & Oliva, Marc. (2025) "Future winter snowfall and extreme snow events in the Pyrenees" Atmospheric Research, 315, 107912. DOI: [10.1016/j.atmosres.2025.107912](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2025.107912)

7. Llasat, María Carmen, Llasat-Botija, Montserrat, Pardo, Erika, Marcos-Matamoros, Raül, & **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**. (2024) "Floods in the Pyrenees: a global view through a regional database" Natural Hazards and Earth System Sciences, 24, 3423–3443. DOI: [10.5194/nhess-24-3423-2024](https://doi.org/10.5194/nhess-24-3423-2024)

8. González-Herrero, Sergi, **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, & Pereira, Paulo. (2024) "Climate change in cold regions" Science of The Total Environment, 933, 173127. DOI: [10.1016/j.scitotenv.2024.173127](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2024.173127)

9. Insua-Costa, Damián, **Lemus-Cánovas, Marc**, González-Alemán, Juan J., Senande-Rivera, Martín, Llasat, María del Carmen, Miguez-Macho, Gonzalo, & Miralles, Diego G. (2024) "Extraordinary 2021 snowstorm in Spain reveals critical threshold response to anthropogenic climate change" Communications Earth & Environment, 5. DOI: [10.1038/s43247-024-01503-7](https://doi.org/10.1038/s43247-024-01503-7)

10. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Montesinos-Ciuró, E., Cearreta-Innocenti, T., Serrano-Notivoli, Roberto, & Royé, Dominic. (2024) "Attribution of the unprecedented heat event of August 2023 in Barcelona (Spain) to observed and projected global warming" Urban Climate, 56, 102019. DOI: [10.1016/j.uclim.2024.102019](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.uclim.2024.102019)

11. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Alonso-González, Esteban, Bonsoms, Josep, & López-Moreno, Juan I. (2024) "Daily concentration of snowfalls in the mountains of the Iberian Peninsula" International Journal of Climatology, 44, 485–500. DOI: [10.1002/joc.8338](https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.8338)

12. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Insua-Costa, Damián, Trigo, Ricardo M., & Miralles, Diego G. (2024) "Record-shattering 2023 Spring heatwave in western Mediterranean amplified by long-term drought" npj Climate and Atmospheric Science, 7. DOI: [10.1038/s41612-024-00569-6](https://doi.org/10.1038/s41612-024-00569-6)

13. Rodríguez, Oriol, & **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**. (2023) "Synoptic patterns triggering tornadic storms on the Iberian Peninsula and the Balearic Islands" Atmospheric Research, 285, 106634. DOI: [10.1016/j.atmosres.2023.106634](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2023.106634)

14. Miró, Juan Javier, **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Serrano-Notivoli, Roberto, Olcina Cantos, Jorge, Estrela, Maria J., Martin-Vide, Javier, Sarricolea, Pablo, & Meseguer-Ruiz, Oliver. (2022) "A component-based approximation for trend detection of intense rainfall in the Spanish Mediterranean coast" Weather and Climate Extremes, 38, 100513. DOI: [10.1016/j.wace.2022.100513](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.wace.2022.100513)

15. Serrano-Notivoli, Roberto, **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Barrao, Samuel, Sarricolea, Pablo, Meseguer-Ruiz, Oliver, & Tejedor, Ernesto. (2022) "Heat and cold waves in mainland Spain: Origins, characteristics, and trends" Weather and Climate Extremes, 37, 100471. DOI: [10.1016/j.wace.2022.100471](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.wace.2022.100471)

16. Sánchez-Almodóvar, Esther, Martin-Vide, Javier, Olcina-Cantos, Jorge, & **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**. (2022) "Are Atmospheric Situations Now More Favourable for Heavy Rainfall in the Spanish Mediterranean? Analysis of Episodes in the Alicante Province (1981–2020)" Atmosphere, 13(9), 1410. DOI: [10.3390/atmos13091410](https://doi.org/10.3390/atmos13091410)

17. Halifa-Marín, Amar, Torres-Vázquez, Miguel A., Pravia-Sarabia, Enrique, **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Jiménez-Guerrero, Pedro, & Montávez, Juan Pedro. (2022) "A multivariate-driven approach for disentangling the reduction in near-natural Iberian water resources post-1980" Hydrology and Earth System Sciences, 26, 4251–4263. DOI: [10.5194/hess-26-4251-2022](https://doi.org/10.5194/hess-26-4251-2022)

18. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**. (2022) "Changes in compound monthly precipitation and temperature extremes and their relationship with teleconnection patterns in the Mediterranean" Journal of Hydrology, 608, 127580. DOI: [10.1016/j.jhydrol.2022.127580](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jhydrol.2022.127580)

19. Martin-Vide, Javier, Lopez-Bustins, Joan-Albert, **Lemus, Marc**, Moreno-Garcia, M. Carmen, Balagué, Xavier, Gonzalez-Hidalgo, José Carlos, Beguería, Santiago, Peña-Angulo, Dhais, & Trullenque, Víctor. (2022) "The consecutive disparity of precipitation in conterminous Spain" Theoretical and Applied Climatology, 147, 1151–1161. DOI: [10.1007/s00704-021-03877-6](https://doi.org/10.1007/s00704-021-03877-6)

20. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**. (2021) "Barcelona intense urban activity greatly limited the role of the atmosphere in driving NO₂ concentration in 2018" Environmental Research Communications, 3(10), 105006. DOI: [10.1088/2515-7620/ac2fbb](https://doi.org/10.1088/2515-7620/ac2fbb)

21. Francos, Marcos, & **Canovas, Marc Lemus**. (2021) "Field observations and remote sensing techniques for evaluation of vegetal recovery after different wildfire severity in a Mediterranean ecosystem" Revista Bosque, 42(2), 245–258.

22. Insua-Costa, Damián, **Lemus-Cánovas, Marc**, Miguez-Macho, Gonzalo, & Llasat, María Carmen. (2021) "Climatology and ranking of hazardous precipitation events in the western Mediterranean area" Atmospheric Research, 255, 105521. DOI: [10.1016/j.atmosres.2021.105521](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2021.105521)

23. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, & Lopez-Bustins, Joan Albert. (2021) "Assessing internal changes in the future structure of dry–hot compound events: the case of the Pyrenees" Natural Hazards and Earth System Sciences, 21, 1721–1738. DOI: [10.5194/nhess-21-1721-2021](https://doi.org/10.5194/nhess-21-1721-2021)

24. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Lopez-Bustins, Joan Albert, Martín-Vide, Javier, Halifa-Marin, Amar, Insua-Costa, Damián, Martinez-Artigas, Joan, Trapero, Laura, Serrano-Notivoli, Roberto, & Cuadrat, José María. (2021) "Characterisation of Extreme Precipitation Events in the Pyrenees: From the Local to the Synoptic Scale" Atmosphere, 12(6), 665. DOI: [10.3390/atmos12060665](https://doi.org/10.3390/atmos12060665)

25. Peña-Angulo, Dhais, Gonzalez-Hidalgo, José Carlos, Sandonís, Leire, Beguería, Santiago, Tomas-Burguera, Miquel, López-Bustins, Joan Albert, **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, & Martin-Vide, Javier. (2021) "Seasonal temperature trends on the Spanish mainland: A secular study (1916–2015)" International Journal of Climatology, 41(5), 3071–3084. DOI: [10.1002/joc.7006](https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.7006)

26. Martinez-Artigas, Joan, **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, & Lopez-Bustins, Joan Albert. (2021) "Precipitation in peninsular Spain: Influence of teleconnection indices and spatial regionalisation" International Journal of Climatology, 41(S1). DOI: [10.1002/joc.6770](https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.6770)

27. Lopez-Bustins, Joan A., & **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**. (2020) "The influence of the Western Mediterranean Oscillation upon the spatio-temporal variability of precipitation over Catalonia (northeastern of the Iberian Peninsula)" Atmospheric Research, 236, 104819. DOI: [10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.104819](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.104819)

28. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Martin-Vide, Javier, Moreno-Garcia, M. Carmen, & Lopez-Bustins, Joan A. (2020) "Estimating Barcelona's metropolitan daytime hot and cold poles using Landsat-8 Land Surface Temperature" Science of The Total Environment, 699, 134307. DOI: [10.1016/j.scitotenv.2019.134307](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.scitotenv.2019.134307)

29. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Lopez-Bustins, Joan A., Martin-Vide, Javier, & Royé, Dominic. (2019) "synoptReg: An R package for computing a synoptic climate classification and a spatial regionalization of environmental data" Environmental Modelling & Software, 118, 114–119. DOI: [10.1016/j.envsoft.2019.04.006](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.envsoft.2019.04.006)

30. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Lopez-Bustins, Joan A., Trapero, Laura, & Martin-Vide, Javier. (2019) "Combining circulation weather types and daily precipitation modelling to derive climatic precipitation regions in the Pyrenees" Atmospheric Research, 220, 181–193. DOI: [10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.01.018](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.atmosres.2019.01.018)

31. **Lemus-Canovas, Marc**, Ninyerola, Miquel, Lopez-Bustins, Joan A., Manguan, Santiago, & Garcia-Sellés, Carles. (2019) "A mixed application of an objective synoptic classification and spatial regression models for deriving winter precipitation regimes in the Eastern Pyrenees" International Journal of Climatology, 39(4), 2244–2259. DOI: [10.1002/joc.5948](https://doi.org/10.1002/joc.5948)
